heading: Rule of construction on equalized spending
label: 6576 Rule of construction on equalized spending
text: Nothing in this subchapter shall be construed to mandate equalized spending per pupil for a State, local educational agency, or school.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior was classified to , prior to repeal by .section 1605 of Pub. L. 89–10section 6515 of this titlePub. L. 114–95
